metadata.description: Qunity — your child's physical activity becomes a game

home.tagline: Your child's colorful journey to physical activity starts here.

login.title: Log in to Qunity
login.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before logging in
login.rateLimited: Too many attempts, please try again shortly

signup.title: Sign up for Qunity
signup.emailTaken: This email address is already registered
signup.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
signup.rateLimited: Too many attempts, please try again shortly

linking.notAuthenticated: Please log in again to do this.
linking.codeAlreadyUsed: This child code has already been used.
linking.alreadyLinked: This child is already linked to you.
linking.genericError: Something went wrong, please try again.

addChild.title: Add a child by code
addChild.description: Enter the code your child received on their screen (format QNTY-XXXXX).

challengeList.empty: You haven't unlocked any challenges yet.

encouragement.zero: Let's start the month moving! Your first workout is waiting for you 💪
encouragement.low: Already {count} workouts this month - great start, keep it up!
encouragement.mid: Wow, {count} workouts this month! You are in great shape 🔥
encouragement.high: {count} workouts this month - you are a real champion! 🏆

tips.heading: Tips for parents
tips.manualTestHint: Manual test mode (temporary): enter a number 1-5 to simulate a tip scenario and verify the engine works end to end.

workout.pointsAwarded: You earned {points} points for this workout.
workout.leveledUp: You moved up to a new color! 🎉
workout.trainedLongerPraise: You trained {minutes} minutes longer than recommended, well done! 💪
workout.parentTogetherLabel: Did a parent train with you?
workout.feelingLabel: How did you feel after the workout?

dashboard.noChildDefined: No child set up yet. Go to Settings and add a child.
dashboard.workoutsInColor: {count} of {total} workouts in the current color
dashboard.workoutsInColorAndPoints: {count} of {total} workouts · {points} points to the next color

journey.empty: No workouts in the system yet.
journey.lockedHint: Finish the workout before this one to unlock it

summary.notFound: No information found for this workout
